title: rosa gallica var. leiophylla
intro: Rosa gallica var. leiophylla, also known as the 'French Lilac' or 'Old Rose', is a fragrant, pink-flowering shrub native to southern Europe. The plant is rich in flavonoids and phenolic compounds, which contribute to its medicinal properties. Traditionally, Rosa gallica var. leiophylla has been used to aid in digestion and reduce inflammation, and its health benefits may include antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or tincture, and its herbal preparations have been used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
